artifact_scope: QEMU-guest helper transform execution and exact refusal rows for a bounded subset of storage-intent data-shape families

rows.operation: encode and decode one deterministic Zstd helper frame
rows.exact_boundary: Helper/library execution only; no mounted policy, receipt, raw-store, recovery, or source-retirement authority.

rows.operation: encode and decode one deterministic LZ4 helper frame
rows.exact_boundary: Helper/library execution only; no mounted policy, receipt, raw-store, recovery, or source-retirement authority.

rows.operation: bind ObjectDigest to exact stored helper-frame bytes and reject one-byte mutation
rows.exact_boundary: Domain-separated helper digest evidence only; no end-to-end mounted integrity, scrub, repair, or durable-media claim.

rows.operation: submit unknown-algorithm and truncated compression frames
rows.exact_boundary: Typed compression helper refusal only; other transform-frame families remain unexecuted.

rows.operation: encrypt/decrypt one extent helper frame and reject wrong-key and tampered ciphertext
rows.exact_boundary: AEAD helper execution only; no key-epoch lifecycle, mounted dispatch, media reachability, cryptographic erase, or source-retirement proof.

rows.operation: encode local 2+1 receipt stripe, reconstruct one missing shard, and refuse one-of-three under-width input
rows.exact_boundary: Local EC helper execution only; no pool placement, distributed recovery, archive recall, availability, or degraded-read product claim.

rows.operation: deduplicate inside a legal domain and refuse illegal or unknown domains

observation.missing_evidence: no runtime dedupe domain and reference-ownership path was executed

rows.exact_boundary: Dedupe work remains owned outside this helper-validation slice.

rows.operation: recall through declared archive media width and serving-role policy

observation.missing_evidence: no archive media, retention, recall, or serving-role path was executed

rows.exact_boundary: Local EC helper execution does not imply archive support.

rows.operation: coalesce records with split/replay and source mapping

observation.missing_evidence: no runtime coalescing implementation or receipt path was executed

rows.exact_boundary: Coalescing and source retirement remain blocked.

rows.operation: rebake old bytes into replacement authority with cutover and rollback receipts

observation.missing_evidence: no rebake executor, cutover receipt, rollback, or source-retirement path was executed

rows.exact_boundary: Placement, rebake, reclaim, and source-retirement work remains outside this slice.

non_claims: not encryption key-lifecycle or cryptographic-erase proof
not EC placement, archive, distributed recovery, or availability proof
not dedupe, coalescing, rebake, reclaim, or source-retirement execution
claim_effect: Actual helper execution now exists for compression, stored-frame digest rejection, AEAD refusal, and local EC reconstruction/refusal, but the registered evidence class and claim remain blocked on the skipped rows and end-to-end authority boundaries.
residual_risk: The passing rows execute helper/library code in one QEMU guest; they do not prove mounted transform dispatch, raw-store conformance, compiled-policy receipt satisfaction, recovery, or source retirement.
Dedupe-domain execution, key-epoch lifecycle proof, archive recall, coalescing, and rebake remain unexecuted, so the transform-execution evidence class and claim remain blocked.
The rows do not widen compression, checksum, encryption, EC/archive, capacity, performance, production, release-readiness, or successor/comparator wording.
